subject: vault door
fact: The vault door is guarded by a stone golem that cannot be reasoned with or argued against.
source_quote: The party reaches a door guarded by a stone golem that cannot be reasoned with or argued against.

subject: stone golem
fact: The stone golem only allows passage to those carrying the scent of Vraxen.
source_quote: the golem only allows passage to those carrying the scent of Vraxen

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur determined that the golem requires the scent of Vraxen for passage.
source_quote: Felkur determines through investigation and arcana that the golem only allows passage to those carrying the scent of Vraxen

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear had picked up the scent of Vraxen while jumping on the table during dinner.
source_quote: the Owlbear, who had picked it up while jumping on the table during the dinner

subject: scent extraction mechanism
fact: Felkur used a scent extraction mechanism he keeps for personal use to extract Vraxen's scent from the Owlbear.
source_quote: one of his gadgets—a scent extraction mechanism he keeps for personal use—to extract Vraxen's scent from the Owlbear

subject: golem access
fact: The stone golem stepped aside to grant the party access to the chamber beyond after sensing the familiar scent.
source_quote: The stone golem, sensing the familiar scent, steps aside to grant the party access to the chamber beyond

subject: vault chamber
fact: The vault is a temperature-controlled 30-by-30-foot chamber containing ledgers and contracts.
source_quote: The party enters a temperature-controlled 30-by-30-foot chamber containing various ledgers and contracts

subject: vault chamber
fact: The vault chamber is kept at a constant 55 degrees Fahrenheit.
source_quote: The party enters a 30-by-30-foot chamber kept at a constant 55 degrees Fahrenheit

subject: vault chamber
fact: The walls of the vault chamber are lined with soul coins, infernal ledgers, and contracts.
source_quote: its walls lined with soul coins, infernal ledgers, and contracts

subject: reinforced Mithril door
fact: The party faces a reinforced Mithril door with three distinct locking mechanisms.
source_quote: They face a reinforced Mithril door with three distinct locking mechanisms

subject: first lock picked
fact: Felkur used his thieves' tools to pick the first physical lock with ease.
source_quote: Felkur uses his thieves' tools to pick the first physical lock, rolling exceptionally well and bypassing it with ease

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim used his active True Seeing to confirm the vault room is free of traps.
source_quote: Bramgrim uses his active True Seeing to confirm the room is free of traps

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths is located on a central pedestal beneath a crystal dome.
source_quote: The party locates the Lexicon of Oaths on a central pedestal beneath a crystal dome

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths is a massive tome bound in devil hide with pages made from processed souls.
source_quote: a massive tome bound in devil hide with pages made from processed souls

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths automatically updates with all infernal contracts.
source_quote: that automatically updates with all infernal contracts

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur discovered his own contract, Transaction 44781, in the ledger.
source_quote: Felkur investigates the ledger and discovers his own contract: Transaction 44781

subject: Felkur Oldenwood
fact: Transaction 44781 records that a drunken Felkur Oldenwood sold a priceless artifact to Limping Oric for 45 gold pieces.
source_quote: recording that a drunken Felkur Oldenwood sold a priceless artifact to Limping Oric for 45 gold pieces

subject: Limping Oric
fact: Limping Oric purchased a priceless artifact from Felkur for 45 gold pieces.
source_quote: sold a priceless artifact to Limping Oric for 45 gold pieces

subject: brooch
fact: The artifact Felkur sold was a brooch belonging to the high priests of Mulmaster.
source_quote: the artifact Felkur unknowingly stole and sold was a brooch belonging to the high priests of Mulmaster

subject: Phantom Thief legend
fact: Felkur's drunken fiddling activated the brooch's ability to make him impervious to divination, creating the legend of the Phantom Thief.
source_quote: his drunken fiddling activated its ability to make him impervious to divination—creating the legend of the Phantom Thief

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: The party realized Maram il Vass set them up by placing a contract on them to steal the Lexicon of Oaths.
source_quote: The party realizes that Maram il Vass set them up by placing a contract on them to steal the very book they are now holding

subject: contract loophole
fact: Felkur identified a loophole stating that if the Lexicon no longer contains his information, the contract is null and void.
source_quote: Felkur identifies a loophole: if the Lexicon no longer contains his information, the contract is null and void

subject: elevator approach
fact: The party heard the elevator approaching, signaling that someone was coming.
source_quote: The party hears the elevator approaching, signaling that someone is coming

subject: Lexicon entry scramble
fact: Felkur decided to scramble his entry in the Lexicon of Oaths rather than ripping the page out.
source_quote: Felkur decides to scramble his entry in the Lexicon of Oaths rather than ripping the page out

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur successfully changed the seller's name in the contract from his own to Veris of Mulmaster.
source_quote: Felkur successfully changes the seller's name in the contract from his own to that of Veris of Mulmaster

subject: Veris of Mulmaster
fact: Felkur attributed the theft of the Shard of Crysalized Faerzess to Veris of Mulmaster in a forged entry.
source_quote: attributing the theft of the Shard of Crysalized Faerzess to the 'Phantom Ghosts'

subject: soulcoin ledger
fact: The party found a soulcoin ledger in the vault.
source_quote: The party searches the vault and finds a soulcoin ledger

subject: Vraxen's personal journal
fact: The party found Vraxen's personal journal detailing plans to betray his Yugoloth superiors.
source_quote: Vraxen's personal journal detailing plans to betray his Yugoloth superiors

subject: blank devil-binding contracts
fact: The party found blank devil-binding contracts in the vault.
source_quote: blank devil-binding contracts

subject: Shard of Crysalized Faerzess
fact: The party found a Shard of Crysalized Faerzess in the vault.
source_quote: and Shard of Crysalized Faerzess

subject: Shard of Crysalized Faerzess
fact: Felkur pocketed the Shard of Crysalized Faerzess, a large pure crystal.
source_quote: Felkur pockets shard of crystallized Faerzess, a large pure crystal

subject: Shard of Crysalized Faerzess
fact: The Shard of Crysalized Faerzess can enhance Felkur's artificer abilities.
source_quote: that can enhance his artificer abilities

subject: forged entry creation
fact: Felkur created a forged entry in the ledger attributing the theft of the Shard of Crysalized Faerzess to the 'Phantom Ghosts'.
source_quote: Felkur creates a forged entry in the ledger attributing the theft of the Shard of Crysalized Faerzess to the 'Phantom Ghosts'

subject: secret door escape
fact: The party located a secret door within the vault and escaped before the stone golem's fail-safe security reactivated.
source_quote: The party locates a secret door within the vault and escapes before the stone golem's fail-safe security reactivates

subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: The adventurers climbed to the peak of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: The adventurers climb to the peak of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning peak
fact: The peak of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning is a 60-foot diameter chamber open to poisonous clouds above.
source_quote: a 60-foot diameter chamber open to poisonous clouds above

subject: teleportation circle
fact: The party encountered a 20-foot diameter permanent teleportation circle glowing with sickly green energy.
source_quote: They encounter a 20-foot diameter permanent teleportation circle glowing with sickly green energy

subject: Fae's C crystals
fact: Felkur began recalibrating the teleportation circle using Fae's C crystals.
source_quote: Felkur begins the complex process of recalibrating the teleportation circle using Fae's C crystals

subject: portal recalibration
fact: Felkur began a complex hacking process to recalibrate the teleportation circle requiring intense concentration and multiple arcane adjustments over ten rounds.
source_quote: Felkur begins a complex hacking process to recalibrate the teleportation circle, requiring intense concentration and multiple arcane adjustments over ten rounds

subject: Daein
fact: Daein and the Owlbear positioned themselves to block the single iron door leading to the staircase.
source_quote: Daein and the Owlbear position themselves to block the single iron door leading to the staircase

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear positioned itself to block the single iron door leading to the staircase.
source_quote: Daein and the Owlbear position themselves to block the single iron door leading to the staircase

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas prepared her bow to strike anything that emerged from the stairwell.
source_quote: Akritas prepares her bow to strike anything that emerges from the stairwell

subject: High Inquisitor Veris
fact: An injured High Inquisitor Veris arrived at the door with a stone golem.
source_quote: An injured High Inquisitor Veris and a stone golem arrive at the door

subject: High Inquisitor Veris
fact: Veris shouted threats of revenge and fury over the forgery left in the Lexicon.
source_quote: with Veris shouting threats of revenge and fury over the forgery left in the Lexicon

subject: door forced open
fact: Veris commanded the golem to rip the door off its hinges, causing it to smash through.
source_quote: Veris commands the golem to rip the door off its hinges, causing it to smash through

subject: golem shove attempt
fact: Daein attempted to shove the stone golem but failed to move the massive construct.
source_quote: Daein attempts to shove the stone golem but fails to move the massive construct

subject: owlbear engages golem
fact: The Owlbear engaged the stone golem in melee, striking it with its magical claws.
source_quote: The Owlbear engages the stone golem in melee, striking it with its magical claws

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim cast Spirit Guardians, summoning spectral spirits that swirl around the enemies.
source_quote: Bramgrim casts Spirit Guardians, summoning spectral spirits that swirl around the enemies

subject: Spirit Guardians damage
fact: Bramgrim's Spirit Guardians dealt significant damage to both the golem and Varexis.
source_quote: and deal significant damage to both the golem and Varexis

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur, rendered invisible, deployed his eldritch cannon to blast the stone golem with fire.
source_quote: Felkur, rendered invisible, deploys his eldritch cannon to blast the stone golem with fire

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas marked the stone golem with Hunter's Mark.
source_quote: Akritas marks the stone golem with Hunter's Mark

subject: portal stabilization
fact: Felkur successfully installed shattered nodes and re-hardwired the crystals into the portal mechanism, stabilizing the teleportation sequence.
source_quote: Felkur successfully installs shattered nodes and re-hardwires the crystals into the portal mechanism, stabilizing the teleportation sequence

subject: Varexis
fact: Varexis teleported into the room to bypass the frontline defenders.
source_quote: Varexis teleports into the room to bypass the frontline defenders

subject: combat status
fact: The session ended mid-combat on round 4, with 6 rounds remaining before the portal was fully recalibrated.
source_quote: The session ends mid-combat on round 4, with 6 rounds remaining before the portal is fully recalibrated

subject: Maerimydra
fact: Maerimydra is a fire giant stronghold where the party is currently infiltrating a high-security spire.
source_quote: A fire giant stronghold where the party is currently infiltrating a high-security spire
